raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Eesaws fazzija us fa-
wu Tehwu : Jr tad teiw tikkai
weena patti Swehtifchana/mans
Tehws ? fivehti mann arridsan/
mans Tehws/ un Eesaws pazehle
fawu Balti un raudaja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Jhsaäks
wiꞥſch Tehws / un fazzija us to:
Rangi / tee Semmes Treknumi
buhs tew par Mahjas-Weetu/un
no tahs Debbee Raffas (buhs
tew swehtitam buht).
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no tawa Sohbina/tu
dsihwoți / un kalpoti tawam
Brahtain/ un tas notifs / kad tu
arridsan walditi/ tad noplehfsfi tu
wiꞥſch Juhgu no tawa Kakla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Eesaws nihdeja to Jeh-
kabu/ tahs Swehtifchanas deht/
ar ko wiꞥſch Tehws to bij swehti-
jis/ un Eesaws fazzija fawu Sir-
di / gann drihs nahfs mannarn
Tehwam Behdu-Deenas / jo es
nokaufchu fawu Brahti Jehabu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Rebekai tappe ſchee
Wahrdi / Eesawa fawa leelaka
Dehla pasfazziti/ un ta nofuhtija/
un aizinaja Jehkabu / fawu ma-
sku Dehlu / un fazzija us to:
Redſi / taws Brahlis Eesaws
preezajahs us to : tew nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu/ mans Dehls/klan-
ſi mannı Balti / zellees / behds
us Lahbanu mannı Brahti Ah-
rana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nihti pee winnu
du Brthdi/ teekams tawa D
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ta Bahrſiba mittejahs.
Teekams tawa Bi
Duſninba no teiwın nostah
unwinsch to aismirst/ ko tu
nam darrijis effi / tad juh
es/ un nemſchu tew no turu
kadeht buhs man juhs ab
weena Deena pamest?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Rebekka fazzija
Jhsaäku: Es esmu apnikkufi
woht / Etta Meitu deht / ja
kabs weenı Geewu nemm n
ta Meitahm / itt ka schihs i
tahm Meitahm fehahs Sem
kam tiktu man wairs dsihwo
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XXVIII. Nodalla
Jehkabs us fawa Tehwa Jhsaäka pawehl
no eet us Mesopotamiju : 3. Eesaws
prett jawo Wezzako Prahtu weenu Se
to Kananiteru Meitahm : 6. Jehka
Gapni tahs Debbes Treppes : 10. E
to Apſohſchanu tahs Kanään Semm
Un ta Pestitaja : 14. Tadeht ap
wiꞥſch Deewam Betela : 20.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad aizinaja Jhsaäk
Jehkabu/ un swehtij
un pawehleja tam
fazzija us to: Tew ne buhs
wu nemıt no tahm Kanan
Meitahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zellees/ eij uhs Mesop
miju / Betueta tawas Ma
Tehwa Mammä/ un nemme
turrenes Geewu/ no Lahban
was Mahtes Brahta Meit
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un DEews tas wiſſuw
nais STIPRAJS DEE
lai tew swehti/ un tas lai teiw
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
